description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly gray and orange color scheme accented by black and blue details. The upper section is dominated by a long, ribbed barrel with pronounced venting along the top, suggesting heat dissipation or aesthetic styling. The stock is compact and angular, with a thumbhole grip and integrated cheek rest, providing ergonomic support. A cylindrical component beneath the barrel, likely a magazine or energy cell, is attached at an angle, enhancing the weapon's modern appearance. The trigger guard is robust and squared, with a reinforced structure and a visible finger groove for improved handling. Overall, the shotgun's construction appears to blend metal and polymer materials, giving it a high-tech, durable look suitable for urban environments.
description: A futuristic, angular shotgun with a ribbed, vented barrel, compact thumbhole stock, and a prominent under-barrel cylindrical component. The design features gray, orange, black, and blue colors with a robust, squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ribbed barrel's venting and the symmetrical alignment of the upper and lower components.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the ribbed barrel, the angled under-barrel cylinder, and the orange and blue color accents.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the thumbhole stock, cheek rest, and the alignment of the barrel and grip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same ribbed barrel and under-barrel cylinder, with clear visibility of the thumbhole grip and stock details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with pronounced ribbing and venting along the top; extended barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, robust trigger guard with a visible finger groove and reinforced structure
